name: Cucumber, Coconut and Caviar
steps: Warm the coconut puree and melt the gelatine.
Once frozen hard, blitz a little at a time in thermos to obtain a fine powder.
Peel horseradish and blitz in Thermomix.
Add oil and cook in thermo at 90 degrees for 10 minutes.
Pass through a chinois into an iced container.
Use a parisienne scoop to ball the cucumbers.
Mix the juice with the horseradish vodka.
Compress cucumber balls in a vac pac machine.
Blend fish stock with cucumber and celery.
Pass through a coffee filter overnight in fridge.
